create table deviceIdentifiers
(
    id integer not null
		constraint device_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	uuid text,
	deviceId text,
	previousDeviceId text
);

create table projects
(
	id integer not null
		constraint project_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	applicationId text,
	trackingAvailable integer,
	sessionTimeout integer,
	aliveTimeout integer,
	currencyAggregationTimeout integer,
	countForRequest integer,
	eventParamsCount integer,
	serverTime integer,
	savedTime integer,
	timeForRequest integer,
	isUserCounting integer,
	isReferralSent integer,
	appVersion text,
	appBuildVersion text,
	excludeJson text,
	activeUserId integer
);

create table users
(
	id integer not null
		constraint user_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	projectId integer
		references projects,
	isDefault integer,
	isLevelResourcesSuspended integer,
	level integer,
	registered integer,
	lastForeground integer,
	lastBackground integer,
    devtodevId integer,
	crossPlatformDevtodevId integer,
	crossPlatformId text,
	previousCrossPlatformId text,
	sessionId integer
);


create table realCurrencyPaymentMarks
(
	id integer not null
		constraint user_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	projectId integer
		references projects,
	orderId text
);

create table events
(
	id integer not null
		constraint event_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	code text,
	json text
);

create table packages
(
	id integer not null
		constraint request_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	json text,
    uuid text
);

create table tutorialStepMarks
(
	id integer not null
		constraint level_resource_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	step integer
);

create table levelResources
(
	id integer not null
		constraint level_resource_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	type integer,
	name text,
	amount integer
);

create table currencyAccrualsInfo
(
	id integer not null
		constraint currency_accrual_info_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	updateTimestamp integer,
    updateSessionId integer
);

create table currencyAccruals
(
	id integer not null
		constraint currency_accrual_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	type integer,
	source text,
	name text,
	amount integer
);


create table userParameters
(
	id integer not null
		constraint currency_accrual_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	key text,
	updated integer,
	boolValue integer,
	longValue integer,
	doubleValue real,
	stringValue text
);


create table userParametersInfo
(
	id integer not null
		constraint currency_accrual_pk
			primary key autoincrement,
	userId integer
		references users,
	key text,
	clearMark integer
);
alter table projects add column devtodevIdTimeout integer;

alter table projects add column numberOfCurrencies integer;
alter table projects add column userCardKeysCount integer;

alter table users
add column devtodevIdTimestamp integer;

create table abTestProject
(
    id             integer not null
        constraint abTestProject_pk
            primary key autoincrement,
    projectId      integer not null
        references projects,
    version        integer default 0 not null,
    userProperties text
);

create table abTestExperiments
(
    id             integer not null
        constraint abTestExperiments_pk
            primary key autoincrement,
    projectId      integer not null
        references projects,
    experimentId   integer,
    creationDate   integer,
    updateDate     integer,
    completionDate integer,
    isTesting      integer default 0 not null,
    parameters     text,
    conditions     text
);

create table abTestExperimentsState
(
    id           integer not null
        constraint abTestExperimentsState_pk
            primary key autoincrement,
    userId       integer not null
        references users,
    experimentId integer not null,
    runAbility   integer,
    involvement  text
);
